projects.title: Pathwise
projects.synopsis: A dark-mode, Brilliant-style learning platform where every concept is taught through short interactive steps, instant feedback, and a path that remembers exactly where you left off. Includes a full course catalog, daily streaks, and a leaderboard to keep you coming back.

projects.title: Dungeon Core
projects.synopsis: Build your lair, crush the heroes, become legend. A dungeon-building strategy game where you ARE the dungeon - design rooms, lay traps, and fend off waves of adventurers. Features guided fast-start runs, head-to-head mode, achievements, and cloud-saved progress.

projects.title: CoolHastorGames
projects.synopsis: A whole arcade in your browser - big full-size games plus 31 classic arcade, puzzle, and party games gathered in one place. Built for game nights with friends, with quick search, featured titles, and player profiles.

projects.title: Stacker Wars
projects.synopsis: Freeze. Merge. Conquer. A fantasy strategy game of frozen towers and merged armies set across a sprawling realm of castles and jungles. Fight through a story campaign, test yourself in skirmishes against the AI, go head-to-head in multiplayer, and dig into a full lore codex.
